mapper.sql: product_id, title, brand, category_name, category1_name, category2_name, category3_name, category4_name, price, image_url, affiliate_url, mall_name, description, source, external_product_id, review_count, rating, visible_yn, created_at, updated_at

sql.where:
visible_yn = 'Y'
AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR brand LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM products
ORDER BY price ASC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY price DESC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, review_count DESC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY review_count DESC, rating DESC, product_id DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, product_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND visible_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( title, brand, category_name, category1_name, category2_name, category3_name, category4_name, price, image_url, affiliate_url, mall_name, description, source, external_product_id, review_count, rating, visible_yn ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{brand}, #{categoryName}, #{category1Name}, #{category2Name}, #{category3Name}, #{category4Name}, #{price}, #{imageUrl}, #{affiliateUrl}, #{mallName}, #{description}, #{source}, #{externalProductId}, #{reviewCount}, #{rating}, #{visibleYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET title = #{title}, brand = #{brand}, category_name = #{categoryName}, category1_name = #{category1Name}, category2_name = #{category2Name}, category3_name = #{category3Name}, category4_name = #{category4Name}, price = #{price}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, affiliate_url = #{affiliateUrl}, mall_name = #{mallName}, description = #{description}, visible_yn = #{visibleYn}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM products WHERE visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY rating DESC, review_count DESC, product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT
FROM products WHERE visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY review_count DESC, rating DESC, product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
